ground_truth_value: " YAGO is described as a lightweight, extensible ontology that integrates entities and relations, combining high coverage with high accuracy. The dataset contains approximately 900,000 entities and five million facts, including both taxonomic (Is-A hierarchy) and non-taxonomic relations such as hasWonPrize. It is automatically constructed from Wikipedia and WordNet using a combination of rule-based and heuristic methods. YAGO extends WordNet by introducing entities such as people, organizations, and products, achieving an estimated 95% empirical fact accuracy. It is built on a logically decidable model compatible with RDFS semantics, supporting extensibility through modern information extraction techniques. "
user_value: "a large-scale semantic knowledge graph (KG) and ontology that unites factual information from major reference sources"
